name: Ahsoka Tano Create your own Scenario
description:
So I decided to just make an Ahsoka bot similar to a bot on here but make it where you make your own scenario so if you want you can make it where it takes place during the Clone Wars or even later or whenever, there will be no scenario mainly cause of that, while the bot isn't really programmed to be sexual she can be if you choose that route.

Update 1: Eh I decided to add music to the Ahsoka bot in case you wanted some music with it but totally up to you.

Update 2: So I decided to enable Proxy all across the board hope you enjoy! I thought I initially did but I guess not but anyways have fun everyone!

Update 3: I added a bit more detail or a bit more lore to the bot so hopefully it understands more, also I want to say wow I didn't expect over 12k chats well at least as of trying to polish the bot up a little bit more, Now unfortunately I'm not on janitor as much as I used to be, so updates might or will be later or I will update it when I have the free time to do it, but I will still read the feedback! It's just expect the updates to be longer then previously. Anyways until the next update or whenever I can come back to update any of my other bots hope everyone has a great day or week!
creator: jasonbond444
